head_commit.message:
Add compile-time per-module log prefix via __log_prefix!()

The log! macro references bare __log_prefix!() which resolves at
the call site via Rust's textual macro scoping. Each crate defines
a default __log_prefix at its crate root with the crate's name as
the prefix.

Note: per-module overrides within a single crate conflict with
empty prefix and retains manual bracket prefixes (e.g. [IOMMU]).
Downstream crates (kernel, components) each set their own prefix.

Applied prefixes to: kernel, block, cmdline, framebuffer, time,
i8042, input, mlsdisk, pci, logger, virtio, uart.
Removed manual bracket prefixes where the crate-level prefix
now provides the same information.
